prompt: Vertical editorial photograph of a cluttered overflowing clothes rail in a bedroom, densely packed with a lively mix of garments: neutrals like cream and taupe interwoven with prints and moderate colour such as red stripe, soft blue, floral and gingham with a little mustard. Colour feels real and varied but lived-in rather than bright or technicolor, and there are no large sheets of pure saturated red. A medium messy pile of clothes gathered on the floor and one or two pieces draped over a chair. Soft window daylight, natural realistic tone, an everyday overwhelmed wardrobe. Candid documentary photography, rich fabric texture and variety, no text, no logos, no faces.
